sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90281" key="prosupostrw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσυπο-στρώννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n90281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread underneath</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ χλωρά</foreign> Bilabel <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὀψαρτ</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
